description_long: This is a modern bungalow complex featuring two main rectangular structures connected by a paved walkway and surrounded by landscaped greenery. The larger building has a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, large windows, and a covered carport at the front. The smaller building appears to be a detached garage or guest house, also with a flat roof and minimalistic design. A prominent pink tennis court with a net is situated adjacent to the main house, adding a recreational element to the property. The landscaping includes palm trees, shrubs, and decorative planters, contributing to a contemporary urban aesthetic. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray with pink accents, and the windows are large and horizontally oriented.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow complex with a rooftop terrace, large windows, a detached garage, and a pink tennis court, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, rooftop terrace, and tennis court adjacent to the main building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, landscaped planters, and the separation between the main house and the detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rooftop terrace, tennis court, and the back of the garage structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the tennis court in full, the rear facade of the main house, and the garage's side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows and grouped side windows
